text:
Created attachment 181032
Update to 0.11

Update security/p5-Crypt-Sodium to 0.11.

Changelog: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Crypt-Sodium/Changes

portlint: looks fine.

Tested using `make test` with perl 5.2[024] on FreeBSD 11.0 amd64.
Build tested with poudriere testport on FreeBSD 10.3 i386/amd64 and FreeBSD 11.0 i386/amd64, armv6, mips/mips64.
